summary: Comprehensive testing of Tiebreak System implementation completed. All 13 backend tests passed (1 skipped). Admin Panel UI verified: League standings table shows 'Indovinati', 'Esatti', '1X2' columns. Trofei page has 'Backfill Statistiche Tiebreak' button. API returns tiebreak_rules array and new fields (total_correct_predictions, exact_score_hits, one_x_two_hits) in standings entries.

standings_sorting.sort_order: total_points DESC, total_correct_predictions DESC, exact_score_hits DESC, one_x_two_hits DESC

admin_standings_table.location: Admin UI -> Leghe -> Control Room -> Apri Classifica

admin_trofei_backfill_button.description: Ricalcola le statistiche di spareggio (Indovinati, Esatti, 1X2) per tutti i punteggi esistenti

mobile_rankings_ind_column.renders: correctCol with 'Ind.' label showing total_correct_predictions value

tiebreak_messages.total_correct_predictions: Vince per tiebreak: piu pronostici indovinati
tiebreak_messages.exact_score_hits: Vince per tiebreak: piu risultati esatti

test_scenarios_verified: 2. Standings entries include total_correct_predictions, exact_score_hits, one_x_two_hits - PASS
3. Standings sorted by points DESC, then tiebreak criteria - PASS
4. Standings returns correct league info - PASS
5. POST /api/admin/backfill-tiebreak-stats requires admin (403 for regular user) - PASS
6. Backfill endpoint returns success with summaries_updated count - PASS
8. Tournament all-matchups returns matchup data with tiebreak_reason field - PASS
9. Matchup live view returns score details - PASS
11. Admin UI contains tiebreak-related elements (Indovinati, Esatti, 1X2) - PASS
12. Admin standings table has new columns - PASS
13. Data integrity: total_correct_predictions >= exact_score_hits + one_x_two_hits - PASS
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from previous backfill runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tiebreak system fully implemented and tested. The standings API returns tiebreak_rules array and entries include total_correct_predictions, exact_score_hits, one_x_two_hits. Admin panel League Control Room shows standings with Indovinati/Esatti/1X2 columns. Trofei page has backfill button for tiebreak stats. Mobile rankings.tsx renders 'Ind.' column in total tab. Tournament tiebreak logic sets tiebreak_reason on completed matchups with tied points. No completed knockout tournament rounds exist yet to test live tiebreak scenarios.
